# TrackSnack

> TrackSnack (tracksnack.live) is an interactive AI music radio and
> on-demand song kitchen. Listeners order custom songs — any topic,
> any genre — and tracks are generated and premiered live within
> minutes. Think fast food, but for music.

## What TrackSnack does

- Custom AI-generated songs made to order in ~5 minutes
- Live streams where tracks are "cooked" in real time and premiered on air
- Personalized songs for birthdays, friends, memes, and events
- Audience voting: Dish of the Day, Dish of the Week
- Jukebox: a growing catalog of all tracks made from listener orders
- Languages: Russian, English, more coming

## How to order

- Telegram: https://t.me/tracksnack — main ordering channel and bot
- Live streams: orders taken in chat during broadcasts
- Priority orders available via paid tips

## Key pages

- [Home](https://tracksnack.live): what TrackSnack is, latest tracks

## For press and partners

TrackSnack is built by an independent creator with 380+ published
AI tracks and 44K+ plays. Contact: hello@tracksnack.live
